> devtools::check()
══ Documenting ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
ℹ Updating blur documentation
ℹ Loading blur
Writing ]8;;x-r-run:pkgload::dev_help('sipp')sipp.Rd]8;;
Writing ]8;;x-r-run:pkgload::dev_help('predict.ulm')predict.ulm.Rd]8;;

══ Building ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
Setting env vars:
• CFLAGS    : -Wall -pedantic -fdiagnostics-color=always
• CXXFLAGS  : -Wall -pedantic -fdiagnostics-color=always
• CXX11FLAGS: -Wall -pedantic -fdiagnostics-color=always
• CXX14FLAGS: -Wall -pedantic -fdiagnostics-color=always
• CXX17FLAGS: -Wall -pedantic -fdiagnostics-color=always
• CXX20FLAGS: -Wall -pedantic -fdiagnostics-color=always
── R CMD build ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
✔  checking for file ‘/home/d/Desktop/Mizzou/Research/blur/DESCRIPTION’ (426ms)
─  preparing ‘blur’: (18.4s)
✔  checking DESCRIPTION meta-information
   Warning: /tmp/RtmpRlKXVy/Rbuild6082f295001a8/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:20: unexpected section header '\source'
   Warning: /tmp/RtmpRlKXVy/Rbuild6082f295001a8/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:23: unexpected section header '\usage'
   Warning: /tmp/RtmpRlKXVy/Rbuild6082f295001a8/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:26: unexpected section header '\description'
   Warning: /tmp/RtmpRlKXVy/Rbuild6082f295001a8/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:29: unexpected section header '\keyword'
   Warning: /tmp/RtmpRlKXVy/Rbuild6082f295001a8/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:30: unexpected END_OF_INPUT '
   '
─  installing the package to build vignettes
✔  creating vignettes (23.8s)
─  checking for LF line-endings in source and make files and shell scripts (823ms)
─  checking for empty or unneeded directories
   Warning: /tmp/RtmpRlKXVy/Rbuild6082f295001a8/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:20: unexpected section header '\source'
   Warning: /tmp/RtmpRlKXVy/Rbuild6082f295001a8/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:23: unexpected section header '\usage'
   Warning: /tmp/RtmpRlKXVy/Rbuild6082f295001a8/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:26: unexpected section header '\description'
   Warning: /tmp/RtmpRlKXVy/Rbuild6082f295001a8/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:29: unexpected section header '\keyword'
   Warning: /tmp/RtmpRlKXVy/Rbuild6082f295001a8/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:30: unexpected END_OF_INPUT '
   '
     NB: this package now depends on R (>= 4.1.0)
     WARNING: Added dependency on R >= 4.1.0 because package code uses the
     pipe |> or function shorthand \(...) syntax added in R 4.1.0.
     File(s) using such syntax:
       ‘ulm.R’
─  building ‘blur_0.0.0.9000.tar.gz’
   
══ Checking ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
Setting env vars:
• _R_CHECK_CRAN_INCOMING_USE_ASPELL_           : TRUE
• _R_CHECK_CRAN_INCOMING_REMOTE_               : FALSE
• _R_CHECK_CRAN_INCOMING_                      : FALSE
• _R_CHECK_FORCE_SUGGESTS_                     : FALSE
• _R_CHECK_PACKAGES_USED_IGNORE_UNUSED_IMPORTS_: FALSE
• NOT_CRAN                                     : true
── R CMD check ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
─  using log directory ‘/tmp/RtmpHMSauK/file1f3a312fac1/blur.Rcheck’ (446ms)
─  using R version 4.5.1 (2025-06-13)
─  using platform: x86_64-pc-linux-gnu
─  R was compiled by
       gcc (Ubuntu 13.3.0-6ubuntu2~24.04) 13.3.0
       GNU Fortran (Ubuntu 13.3.0-6ubuntu2~24.04) 13.3.0
─  running under: Linux Mint 22
─  using session charset: UTF-8
─  using options ‘--no-manual --as-cran’ (2m 6.6s)
✔  checking for file ‘blur/DESCRIPTION’
─  this is package ‘blur’ version ‘0.0.0.9000’
─  package encoding: UTF-8
✔  checking package namespace information
✔  checking package dependencies (1.2s)
✔  checking if this is a source package
✔  checking if there is a namespace
✔  checking for executable files
✔  checking for hidden files and directories
✔  checking for portable file names
✔  checking for sufficient/correct file permissions
─  checking whether package ‘blur’ can be installed ... [33s/23s] WARNING (23.2s)
   Found the following significant warnings:
     Note: possible error in 'rinvgamma(n = 1, shape = a + ': unused arguments (shape = a + D/2, scale = b + t(eta[, 1]) %*% eta[, 1]/2) 
     Note: possible error in 'rinvgamma(n = 1, shape = sigma2_eta_shape, ': unused arguments (shape = sigma2_eta_shape, scale = sigma2_eta_scale) 
     Note: possible error in 'rinvgamma(n = 1, shape = 0.1 + ': unused arguments (shape = 0.1 + D/2, scale = 0.1 + 0.5 * t(eta[, 1]) %*% eta[, 1]) 
     Note: possible error in 'rinvgamma(n = 1, shape = sigma2_shape, ': unused arguments (shape = sigma2_shape, scale = as.numeric(sigma2_scale)) 
     Note: possible error in 'rmvnorm(nsamp, mean = tt$BU$mean, ': unused argument (sigma = as.matrix(tt$BU$Cov)) 
     Warning: /tmp/RtmpHMSauK/file1f3a312fac1/blur.Rcheck/00_pkg_src/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:20: unexpected section header '\source'
     Warning: /tmp/RtmpHMSauK/file1f3a312fac1/blur.Rcheck/00_pkg_src/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:23: unexpected section header '\usage'
     Warning: /tmp/RtmpHMSauK/file1f3a312fac1/blur.Rcheck/00_pkg_src/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:26: unexpected section header '\description'
     Warning: /tmp/RtmpHMSauK/file1f3a312fac1/blur.Rcheck/00_pkg_src/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:29: unexpected section header '\keyword'
     Warning: /tmp/RtmpHMSauK/file1f3a312fac1/blur.Rcheck/00_pkg_src/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:30: unexpected END_OF_INPUT '
   See ‘/tmp/RtmpHMSauK/file1f3a312fac1/blur.Rcheck/00install.out’ for details.
   Information on the location(s) of code generating the ‘Note’s can be
   obtained by re-running with environment variable R_KEEP_PKG_SOURCE set
   to ‘yes’.
─  checking installed package size ... INFO
     installed size is 21.9Mb
     sub-directories of 1Mb or more:
       data  21.7Mb
✔  checking package directory
✔  checking for future file timestamps (356ms)
✔  checking ‘build’ directory
W  checking DESCRIPTION meta-information
   Non-standard license specification:
     `use_mit_license()`
   Standardizable: FALSE
   Warning: /tmp/RtmpHMSauK/file1f3a312fac1/blur.Rcheck/00_pkg_src/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:20: unexpected section header '\source'
   Warning: /tmp/RtmpHMSauK/file1f3a312fac1/blur.Rcheck/00_pkg_src/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:23: unexpected section header '\usage'
   Warning: /tmp/RtmpHMSauK/file1f3a312fac1/blur.Rcheck/00_pkg_src/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:26: unexpected section header '\description'
   Warning: /tmp/RtmpHMSauK/file1f3a312fac1/blur.Rcheck/00_pkg_src/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:29: unexpected section header '\keyword'
   Warning: /tmp/RtmpHMSauK/file1f3a312fac1/blur.Rcheck/00_pkg_src/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:30: unexpected END_OF_INPUT '
   '
N  checking top-level files
   Non-standard files/directories found at top level:
     ‘notes.txt’ ‘pu2018.csv’ ‘synth_tests.R’ ‘vignette_draft.R’
✔  checking for left-over files
✔  checking index information
✔  checking package subdirectories (668ms)
✔  checking code files for non-ASCII characters
✔  checking R files for syntax errors
✔  checking whether the package can be loaded (1s)
✔  checking whether the package can be loaded with stated dependencies (920ms)
✔  checking whether the package can be unloaded cleanly (874ms)
✔  checking whether the namespace can be loaded with stated dependencies (938ms)
✔  checking whether the namespace can be unloaded cleanly (951ms)
✔  checking loading without being on the library search path (985ms)
W  checking dependencies in R code (2s)
   '::' or ':::' imports not declared from:
     ‘MASS’ ‘bayesianVARs’
✔  checking S3 generic/method consistency (1.1s)
✔  checking replacement functions (878ms)
✔  checking foreign function calls (1.1s)
N  checking R code for possible problems (8.9s)
   fit_AL_cs_mcmc: warning in rinvgamma(n = 1, a = hyperparams$a + 3 *
     n/2, b = as.numeric(hyperparams$b + sum(weights * nu) + t(yCxi -
     theta * nu) %*% (W/2) %*% (yCxi - theta * nu))): partial argument
     match of 'a' to 'alpha'
   fit_AL_cs_mcmc: warning in rinvgamma(n = 1, a = hyperparams$a + 3 *
     n/2, b = as.numeric(hyperparams$b + sum(weights * nu) + t(yCxi -
     theta * nu) %*% (W/2) %*% (yCxi - theta * nu))): partial argument
     match of 'b' to 'beta'
   fit_AL_cs_mcmc: warning in rinvgamma(n = 1, a = hyperparams$a + r/2, b
     = hyperparams$b + crossprod(eta, eta)/2): partial argument match of
     'a' to 'alpha'
   fit_AL_cs_mcmc: warning in rinvgamma(n = 1, a = hyperparams$a + r/2, b
     = hyperparams$b + crossprod(eta, eta)/2): partial argument match of
     'b' to 'beta'
   fit_ord_lon_mcmc: warning in rinvgamma(n = 1, a = a + r/2, b = b +
     t(eta[, 1]) %*% eta[, 1]/2): partial argument match of 'a' to 'alpha'
   fit_ord_lon_mcmc: warning in rinvgamma(n = 1, a = a + r/2, b = b +
     t(eta[, 1]) %*% eta[, 1]/2): partial argument match of 'b' to 'beta'
   fit_ord_lon_mcmc: warning in rinvgamma(n = 1, a = sigma2_eta_shape, b =
     sigma2_eta_scale): partial argument match of 'a' to 'alpha'
   fit_ord_lon_mcmc: warning in rinvgamma(n = 1, a = sigma2_eta_shape, b =
     sigma2_eta_scale): partial argument match of 'b' to 'beta'
   confint.ulm : <anonymous>: no visible global function definition for
     ‘quantile’
   fit_AL_cs_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘lm’
   fit_AL_cs_mcmc: no visible global function definition for
     ‘txtProgressBar’
   fit_AL_cs_mcmc: no visible global function definition for
     ‘setTxtProgressBar’
   fit_AL_cs_vb: no visible global function definition for ‘lm’
   fit_AL_cs_vb: no visible binding for global variable ‘y’
   fit_bin_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘%>%’
   fit_bin_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘glm’
   fit_bin_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for
     ‘as.formula’
   fit_bin_lon_mcmc: no visible binding for global variable ‘pop_covars’
   fit_bin_lon_mcmc: no visible binding for global variable ‘binomial’
   fit_bin_lon_mcmc: no visible binding for global variable ‘HPS_pop_long’
   fit_bin_lon_mcmc: no visible binding for global variable ‘coefficients’
   fit_bin_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘rmvn’
   fit_bin_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for
     ‘txtProgressBar’
   fit_bin_lon_mcmc: possible error in rinvgamma(n = 1, shape = a + D/2,
     scale = b + t(eta[, 1]) %*% eta[, 1]/2): unused arguments (shape = a
     + D/2, scale = b + t(eta[, 1]) %*% eta[, 1]/2)
   fit_bin_lon_mcmc: possible error in rinvgamma(n = 1, shape =
     sigma2_eta_shape, scale = sigma2_eta_scale): unused arguments (shape
     = sigma2_eta_shape, scale = sigma2_eta_scale)
   fit_bin_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘rtrunc’
   fit_bin_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘rnorm’
   fit_bin_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for
     ‘setTxtProgressBar’
   fit_bin_lon_vb: no visible global function definition for
     ‘model.matrix’
   fit_bin_lon_vb: no visible global function definition for ‘pnorm’
   fit_bin_lon_vb: no visible global function definition for ‘dnorm’
   fit_bin_lon_vb: no visible global function definition for ‘plogis’
   fit_binary_cs_mcmc: no visible global function definition for
     ‘txtProgressBar’
   fit_binary_cs_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘rgamma’
   fit_binary_cs_mcmc: no visible global function definition for
     ‘setTxtProgressBar’
   fit_binary_cs_vb: no visible global function definition for ‘plogis’
   fit_gauss_cs_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘rgamma’
   fit_gauss_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for
     ‘model.matrix’
   fit_gauss_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘rmvn’
   fit_gauss_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘rtrunc’
   fit_gauss_lon_mcmc: possible error in rinvgamma(n = 1, shape =
     sigma2_eta_shape, scale = sigma2_eta_scale): unused arguments (shape
     = sigma2_eta_shape, scale = sigma2_eta_scale)
   fit_gauss_lon_mcmc: possible error in rinvgamma(n = 1, shape = 0.1 +
     D/2, scale = 0.1 + 0.5 * t(eta[, 1]) %*% eta[, 1]): unused arguments
     (shape = 0.1 + D/2, scale = 0.1 + 0.5 * t(eta[, 1]) %*% eta[, 1])
   fit_gauss_lon_mcmc: possible error in rinvgamma(n = 1, shape =
     sigma2_shape, scale = as.numeric(sigma2_scale)): unused arguments
     (shape = sigma2_shape, scale = as.numeric(sigma2_scale))
   fit_gauss_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘runif’
   fit_gauss_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘dnorm’
   fit_gauss_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘rnorm’
   fit_mult_cs_vb: no visible global function definition for ‘PLMBvb’
   fit_mult_cs_vb: possible error in rmvnorm(nsamp, mean = tt$BU$mean,
     sigma = as.matrix(tt$BU$Cov)): unused argument (sigma =
     as.matrix(tt$BU$Cov))
   fit_mult_cs_vb: no visible global function definition for ‘plogis’
   fit_mult_cs_vb: no visible binding for global variable ‘Stick’
   fit_mult_lon_vb: no visible global function definition for
     ‘fit_vb_btulm’
   fit_ord_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘rnorm’
   fit_ord_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for
     ‘txtProgressBar’
   fit_ord_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for
     ‘setTxtProgressBar’
   fit_ord_lon_vb: no visible global function definition for ‘rnorm’
   fit_ord_lon_vb: no visible global function definition for
     ‘model.matrix’
   fit_ord_lon_vb: no visible global function definition for ‘pnorm’
   fit_ord_lon_vb: no visible global function definition for ‘dnorm’
   fit_ordinal_cs_mcmc: no visible binding for global variable ‘n’
   fit_ordinal_cs_mcmc: no visible global function definition for
     ‘txtProgressBar’
   fit_ordinal_cs_mcmc: no visible global function definition for
     ‘setTxtProgressBar’
   predict_binary_cs: no visible global function definition for ‘rbinom’
   predict_binary_cs: no visible global function definition for ‘plogis’
   predict_nominal_cs: no visible global function definition for ‘plogis’
   predict_ordinal_cs: no visible global function definition for ‘plogis’
   rmvnorm: no visible global function definition for ‘rnorm’
   rmvnorm_prec: no visible global function definition for ‘rnorm’
   sample_MVN: no visible global function definition for ‘rnorm’
   summary.ulm: no visible global function definition for ‘coef’
   summary.ulm: no visible global function definition for ‘confint’
   validate_ulm: no visible binding for global variable ‘algorithm’
   Undefined global functions or variables:
     %>% HPS_pop_long PLMBvb Stick algorithm as.formula binomial coef
     coefficients confint dnorm fit_vb_btulm glm lm model.matrix n plogis
     pnorm pop_covars quantile rbinom rgamma rmvn rnorm rtrunc runif
     setTxtProgressBar txtProgressBar y
   Consider adding
     importFrom("stats", "as.formula", "binomial", "coef", "coefficients",
                "confint", "dnorm", "glm", "lm", "model.matrix", "plogis",
                "pnorm", "quantile", "rbinom", "rgamma", "rnorm", "runif")
     importFrom("utils", "setTxtProgressBar", "txtProgressBar")
   to your NAMESPACE file.
W  checking Rd files
   prepare_Rd: ./man/census_table_2018.Rd:20: unexpected section header '\source'
   prepare_Rd: ./man/census_table_2018.Rd:23: unexpected section header '\usage'
   prepare_Rd: ./man/census_table_2018.Rd:26: unexpected section header '\description'
   prepare_Rd: ./man/census_table_2018.Rd:29: unexpected section header '\keyword'
   prepare_Rd: ./man/census_table_2018.Rd:30: unexpected END_OF_INPUT '
   '
   checkRd: (-1) census_table_2018.Rd:20-22: Lost braces
       20 | \source{
          |        ^
   checkRd: (-1) census_table_2018.Rd:23-25: Lost braces
       23 | \usage{
          |       ^
   checkRd: (-1) census_table_2018.Rd:26-28: Lost braces
       26 | \description{
          |             ^
   checkRd: (-1) census_table_2018.Rd:29: Lost braces; missing escapes or markup?
       29 | \keyword{datasets}
          |         ^
✔  checking Rd metadata
✔  checking Rd line widths
─  checking Rd cross-references ...Warning: /tmp/RtmpHMSauK/file1f3a312fac1/blur.Rcheck/00_pkg_src/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:20: unexpected section header '\source'
   Warning: /tmp/RtmpHMSauK/file1f3a312fac1/blur.Rcheck/00_pkg_src/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:23: unexpected section header '\usage'
   Warning: /tmp/RtmpHMSauK/file1f3a312fac1/blur.Rcheck/00_pkg_src/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:26: unexpected section header '\description'
   Warning: /tmp/RtmpHMSauK/file1f3a312fac1/blur.Rcheck/00_pkg_src/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:29: unexpected section header '\keyword'
   Warning: /tmp/RtmpHMSauK/file1f3a312fac1/blur.Rcheck/00_pkg_src/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:30: unexpected END_OF_INPUT '
   '
    OK
W  checking for missing documentation entries (3.7s)
   Undocumented code objects:
     ‘acs2023’ ‘census_table’
   Undocumented data sets:
     ‘acs2023’ ‘census_table’
   All user-level objects in a package should have documentation entries.
   See chapter ‘Writing R documentation files’ in the ‘Writing R
   Extensions’ manual.
✔  checking for code/documentation mismatches (5.6s)
W  checking Rd \usage sections
   Undocumented arguments in Rd file 'coef.ulm.Rd'
     ‘object’ ‘...’ ‘include_reff’
   
   Undocumented arguments in Rd file 'fit_AL_cs_mcmc.Rd'
     ‘fix_sigma’
   
   Undocumented arguments in Rd file 'fit_AL_cs_vb.Rd'
     ‘fix_sigma’
   
   Documented arguments not in \usage in Rd file 'fit_binary_cs_mcmc.Rd':
     ‘sigma2_beta’
   
   Undocumented arguments in Rd file 'fit_ordinal_cs_mcmc.Rd'
     ‘init_vals’ ‘hyperparams’
   Documented arguments not in \usage in Rd file 'fit_ordinal_cs_mcmc.Rd':
     ‘eta’ ‘gamma’ ‘sigma2_eta’ ‘a’ ‘b’ ‘sigma2_beta’ ‘sigma2_gamma’
   
   Undocumented arguments in Rd file 'fit_pl.Rd'
     ‘priors’ ‘weights’ ‘initial_vals’ ‘response_type’ ‘timepoints’
     ‘algorithm’ ‘longitudinal’
   Documented arguments not in \usage in Rd file 'fit_pl.Rd':
     ‘sigma2_beta’ ‘wgt’
   
   Undocumented arguments in Rd file 'predict.ulm.Rd'
     ‘object’ ‘...’
   
   Undocumented arguments in Rd file 'summary.ulm.Rd'
     ‘object’ ‘...’
   
   Undocumented arguments in Rd file 'ulm.Rd'
     ‘longitudinal’ ‘epsilon’ ‘n_samples’ ‘tau’ ‘fix_sigma’
   
   Functions with \usage entries need to have the appropriate \alias
   entries, and all their arguments documented.
   The \usage entries must correspond to syntactically valid R code.
   See chapter ‘Writing R documentation files’ in the ‘Writing R
   Extensions’ manual.
   S3 methods shown with full name in Rd file 'summary.ulm.Rd':
     ‘summary.ulm’
   
   The \usage entries for S3 methods should use the \method markup and not
   their full name.
   See chapter ‘Writing R documentation files’ in the ‘Writing R
   Extensions’ manual.
N  checking Rd contents
   Rd files without \description:
     ‘census_table_2018.Rd’
✔  checking for unstated dependencies in examples
✔  checking contents of ‘data’ directory (8s)
✔  checking data for non-ASCII characters (9.2s)
W  checking LazyData
     LazyData DB of 21.6 MB without LazyDataCompression set
     See §1.1.6 of 'Writing R Extensions'
✔  checking data for ASCII and uncompressed saves
    WARNING
   ‘qpdf’ is needed for checks on size reduction of PDFs
✔  checking installed files from ‘inst/doc’
✔  checking files in ‘vignettes’
─  checking examples ... NONE
✔  checking for unstated dependencies in vignettes (443ms)
✔  checking package vignettes
✔  checking re-building of vignette outputs (7.4s)
✔  checking for non-standard things in the check directory
✔  checking for detritus in the temp directory
   
   See
     ‘/tmp/RtmpHMSauK/file1f3a312fac1/blur.Rcheck/00check.log’
   for details.
   
── R CMD check results ───────────────────────────────────────────────── blur 0.0.0.9000 ────
Duration: 5m 26.5s

❯ checking whether package ‘blur’ can be installed ... [33s/23s] WARNING
  See below...

❯ checking DESCRIPTION meta-information ... WARNING
  Non-standard license specification:
    `use_mit_license()`
  Standardizable: FALSE
  Warning: /tmp/RtmpHMSauK/file1f3a312fac1/blur.Rcheck/00_pkg_src/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:20: unexpected section header '\source'
  Warning: /tmp/RtmpHMSauK/file1f3a312fac1/blur.Rcheck/00_pkg_src/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:23: unexpected section header '\usage'
  Warning: /tmp/RtmpHMSauK/file1f3a312fac1/blur.Rcheck/00_pkg_src/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:26: unexpected section header '\description'
  Warning: /tmp/RtmpHMSauK/file1f3a312fac1/blur.Rcheck/00_pkg_src/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:29: unexpected section header '\keyword'
  Warning: /tmp/RtmpHMSauK/file1f3a312fac1/blur.Rcheck/00_pkg_src/blur/man/census_table_2018.Rd:30: unexpected END_OF_INPUT '
  '

❯ checking dependencies in R code ... WARNING
  '::' or ':::' imports not declared from:
    ‘MASS’ ‘bayesianVARs’

❯ checking Rd files ... WARNING
  prepare_Rd: ./man/census_table_2018.Rd:20: unexpected section header '\source'
  prepare_Rd: ./man/census_table_2018.Rd:23: unexpected section header '\usage'
  prepare_Rd: ./man/census_table_2018.Rd:26: unexpected section header '\description'
  prepare_Rd: ./man/census_table_2018.Rd:29: unexpected section header '\keyword'
  prepare_Rd: ./man/census_table_2018.Rd:30: unexpected END_OF_INPUT '
  '
  checkRd: (-1) census_table_2018.Rd:20-22: Lost braces
      20 | \source{
         |        ^
  checkRd: (-1) census_table_2018.Rd:23-25: Lost braces
      23 | \usage{
         |       ^
  checkRd: (-1) census_table_2018.Rd:26-28: Lost braces
      26 | \description{
         |             ^
  checkRd: (-1) census_table_2018.Rd:29: Lost braces; missing escapes or markup?
      29 | \keyword{datasets}
         |         ^

❯ checking for missing documentation entries ... WARNING
  Undocumented code objects:
    ‘acs2023’ ‘census_table’
  Undocumented data sets:
    ‘acs2023’ ‘census_table’
  All user-level objects in a package should have documentation entries.
  See chapter ‘Writing R documentation files’ in the ‘Writing R
  Extensions’ manual.

❯ checking Rd \usage sections ... WARNING
  Undocumented arguments in Rd file 'coef.ulm.Rd'
    ‘object’ ‘...’ ‘include_reff’
  
  Undocumented arguments in Rd file 'fit_AL_cs_mcmc.Rd'
    ‘fix_sigma’
  
  Undocumented arguments in Rd file 'fit_AL_cs_vb.Rd'
    ‘fix_sigma’
  
  Documented arguments not in \usage in Rd file 'fit_binary_cs_mcmc.Rd':
    ‘sigma2_beta’
  
  Undocumented arguments in Rd file 'fit_ordinal_cs_mcmc.Rd'
    ‘init_vals’ ‘hyperparams’
  Documented arguments not in \usage in Rd file 'fit_ordinal_cs_mcmc.Rd':
    ‘eta’ ‘gamma’ ‘sigma2_eta’ ‘a’ ‘b’ ‘sigma2_beta’ ‘sigma2_gamma’
  
  Undocumented arguments in Rd file 'fit_pl.Rd'
    ‘priors’ ‘weights’ ‘initial_vals’ ‘response_type’ ‘timepoints’
    ‘algorithm’ ‘longitudinal’
  Documented arguments not in \usage in Rd file 'fit_pl.Rd':
    ‘sigma2_beta’ ‘wgt’
  
  Undocumented arguments in Rd file 'predict.ulm.Rd'
    ‘object’ ‘...’
  
  Undocumented arguments in Rd file 'summary.ulm.Rd'
    ‘object’ ‘...’
  
  Undocumented arguments in Rd file 'ulm.Rd'
    ‘longitudinal’ ‘epsilon’ ‘n_samples’ ‘tau’ ‘fix_sigma’
  
  Functions with \usage entries need to have the appropriate \alias
  entries, and all their arguments documented.
  The \usage entries must correspond to syntactically valid R code.
  See chapter ‘Writing R documentation files’ in the ‘Writing R
  Extensions’ manual.
  S3 methods shown with full name in Rd file 'summary.ulm.Rd':
    ‘summary.ulm’
  
  The \usage entries for S3 methods should use the \method markup and not
  their full name.
  See chapter ‘Writing R documentation files’ in the ‘Writing R
  Extensions’ manual.

❯ checking LazyData ... WARNING
    LazyData DB of 21.6 MB without LazyDataCompression set
    See §1.1.6 of 'Writing R Extensions'

❯ checking data for ASCII and uncompressed saves ... OK
   WARNING
  ‘qpdf’ is needed for checks on size reduction of PDFs

❯ checking top-level files ... NOTE
  Non-standard files/directories found at top level:
    ‘notes.txt’ ‘pu2018.csv’ ‘synth_tests.R’ ‘vignette_draft.R’

❯ checking R code for possible problems ... NOTE
  fit_AL_cs_mcmc: warning in rinvgamma(n = 1, a = hyperparams$a + 3 *
    n/2, b = as.numeric(hyperparams$b + sum(weights * nu) + t(yCxi -
    theta * nu) %*% (W/2) %*% (yCxi - theta * nu))): partial argument
    match of 'a' to 'alpha'
  fit_AL_cs_mcmc: warning in rinvgamma(n = 1, a = hyperparams$a + 3 *
    n/2, b = as.numeric(hyperparams$b + sum(weights * nu) + t(yCxi -
    theta * nu) %*% (W/2) %*% (yCxi - theta * nu))): partial argument
    match of 'b' to 'beta'
  fit_AL_cs_mcmc: warning in rinvgamma(n = 1, a = hyperparams$a + r/2, b
    = hyperparams$b + crossprod(eta, eta)/2): partial argument match of
    'a' to 'alpha'
  fit_AL_cs_mcmc: warning in rinvgamma(n = 1, a = hyperparams$a + r/2, b
    = hyperparams$b + crossprod(eta, eta)/2): partial argument match of
    'b' to 'beta'
  fit_ord_lon_mcmc: warning in rinvgamma(n = 1, a = a + r/2, b = b +
    t(eta[, 1]) %*% eta[, 1]/2): partial argument match of 'a' to 'alpha'
  fit_ord_lon_mcmc: warning in rinvgamma(n = 1, a = a + r/2, b = b +
    t(eta[, 1]) %*% eta[, 1]/2): partial argument match of 'b' to 'beta'
  fit_ord_lon_mcmc: warning in rinvgamma(n = 1, a = sigma2_eta_shape, b =
    sigma2_eta_scale): partial argument match of 'a' to 'alpha'
  fit_ord_lon_mcmc: warning in rinvgamma(n = 1, a = sigma2_eta_shape, b =
    sigma2_eta_scale): partial argument match of 'b' to 'beta'
  confint.ulm : <anonymous>: no visible global function definition for
    ‘quantile’
  fit_AL_cs_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘lm’
  fit_AL_cs_mcmc: no visible global function definition for
    ‘txtProgressBar’
  fit_AL_cs_mcmc: no visible global function definition for
    ‘setTxtProgressBar’
  fit_AL_cs_vb: no visible global function definition for ‘lm’
  fit_AL_cs_vb: no visible binding for global variable ‘y’
  fit_bin_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘%>%’
  fit_bin_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘glm’
  fit_bin_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for
    ‘as.formula’
  fit_bin_lon_mcmc: no visible binding for global variable ‘pop_covars’
  fit_bin_lon_mcmc: no visible binding for global variable ‘binomial’
  fit_bin_lon_mcmc: no visible binding for global variable ‘HPS_pop_long’
  fit_bin_lon_mcmc: no visible binding for global variable ‘coefficients’
  fit_bin_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘rmvn’
  fit_bin_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for
    ‘txtProgressBar’
  fit_bin_lon_mcmc: possible error in rinvgamma(n = 1, shape = a + D/2,
    scale = b + t(eta[, 1]) %*% eta[, 1]/2): unused arguments (shape = a
    + D/2, scale = b + t(eta[, 1]) %*% eta[, 1]/2)
  fit_bin_lon_mcmc: possible error in rinvgamma(n = 1, shape =
    sigma2_eta_shape, scale = sigma2_eta_scale): unused arguments (shape
    = sigma2_eta_shape, scale = sigma2_eta_scale)
  fit_bin_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘rtrunc’
  fit_bin_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘rnorm’
  fit_bin_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for
    ‘setTxtProgressBar’
  fit_bin_lon_vb: no visible global function definition for
    ‘model.matrix’
  fit_bin_lon_vb: no visible global function definition for ‘pnorm’
  fit_bin_lon_vb: no visible global function definition for ‘dnorm’
  fit_bin_lon_vb: no visible global function definition for ‘plogis’
  fit_binary_cs_mcmc: no visible global function definition for
    ‘txtProgressBar’
  fit_binary_cs_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘rgamma’
  fit_binary_cs_mcmc: no visible global function definition for
    ‘setTxtProgressBar’
  fit_binary_cs_vb: no visible global function definition for ‘plogis’
  fit_gauss_cs_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘rgamma’
  fit_gauss_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for
    ‘model.matrix’
  fit_gauss_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘rmvn’
  fit_gauss_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘rtrunc’
  fit_gauss_lon_mcmc: possible error in rinvgamma(n = 1, shape =
    sigma2_eta_shape, scale = sigma2_eta_scale): unused arguments (shape
    = sigma2_eta_shape, scale = sigma2_eta_scale)
  fit_gauss_lon_mcmc: possible error in rinvgamma(n = 1, shape = 0.1 +
    D/2, scale = 0.1 + 0.5 * t(eta[, 1]) %*% eta[, 1]): unused arguments
    (shape = 0.1 + D/2, scale = 0.1 + 0.5 * t(eta[, 1]) %*% eta[, 1])
  fit_gauss_lon_mcmc: possible error in rinvgamma(n = 1, shape =
    sigma2_shape, scale = as.numeric(sigma2_scale)): unused arguments
    (shape = sigma2_shape, scale = as.numeric(sigma2_scale))
  fit_gauss_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘runif’
  fit_gauss_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘dnorm’
  fit_gauss_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘rnorm’
  fit_mult_cs_vb: no visible global function definition for ‘PLMBvb’
  fit_mult_cs_vb: possible error in rmvnorm(nsamp, mean = tt$BU$mean,
    sigma = as.matrix(tt$BU$Cov)): unused argument (sigma =
    as.matrix(tt$BU$Cov))
  fit_mult_cs_vb: no visible global function definition for ‘plogis’
  fit_mult_cs_vb: no visible binding for global variable ‘Stick’
  fit_mult_lon_vb: no visible global function definition for
    ‘fit_vb_btulm’
  fit_ord_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for ‘rnorm’
  fit_ord_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for
    ‘txtProgressBar’
  fit_ord_lon_mcmc: no visible global function definition for
    ‘setTxtProgressBar’
  fit_ord_lon_vb: no visible global function definition for ‘rnorm’
  fit_ord_lon_vb: no visible global function definition for
    ‘model.matrix’
  fit_ord_lon_vb: no visible global function definition for ‘pnorm’
  fit_ord_lon_vb: no visible global function definition for ‘dnorm’
  fit_ordinal_cs_mcmc: no visible binding for global variable ‘n’
  fit_ordinal_cs_mcmc: no visible global function definition for
    ‘txtProgressBar’
  fit_ordinal_cs_mcmc: no visible global function definition for
    ‘setTxtProgressBar’
  predict_binary_cs: no visible global function definition for ‘rbinom’
  predict_binary_cs: no visible global function definition for ‘plogis’
  predict_nominal_cs: no visible global function definition for ‘plogis’
  predict_ordinal_cs: no visible global function definition for ‘plogis’
  rmvnorm: no visible global function definition for ‘rnorm’
  rmvnorm_prec: no visible global function definition for ‘rnorm’
  sample_MVN: no visible global function definition for ‘rnorm’
  summary.ulm: no visible global function definition for ‘coef’
  summary.ulm: no visible global function definition for ‘confint’
  validate_ulm: no visible binding for global variable ‘algorithm’
  Undefined global functions or variables:
    %>% HPS_pop_long PLMBvb Stick algorithm as.formula binomial coef
    coefficients confint dnorm fit_vb_btulm glm lm model.matrix n plogis
    pnorm pop_covars quantile rbinom rgamma rmvn rnorm rtrunc runif
    setTxtProgressBar txtProgressBar y
  Consider adding
    importFrom("stats", "as.formula", "binomial", "coef", "coefficients",
               "confint", "dnorm", "glm", "lm", "model.matrix", "plogis",
               "pnorm", "quantile", "rbinom", "rgamma", "rnorm", "runif")
    importFrom("utils", "setTxtProgressBar", "txtProgressBar")
  to your NAMESPACE file.

❯ checking Rd contents ... NOTE
  Rd files without \description:
    ‘census_table_2018.Rd’

0 errors ✔ | 8 warnings ✖ | 3 notes ✖
